title: LinkedIn for Personal Branding
subline: Your profile is your storefront. Curate accordingly.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A 4x8 grid of tiny user tiles (a LinkedIn search results page) sits faintly in the lower 2/3. The first tile (the 'you') is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(126 1080)" fill="none">
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="174" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="348" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="522" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="696" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="870" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="1044" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <rect x="1218" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      <g transform="translate(0 86)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="174" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="348" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="522" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="696" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="870" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="1044" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="1218" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(0 172)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="174" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="348" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="522" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="696" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="870" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="1044" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="1218" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(0 258)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="174" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="348" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="522" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="696" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="870" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="1044" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
        <rect x="1218" y="0" width="168" height="80"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Faint avatar dots top-left of each cell -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">
      <circle cx="22" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="196" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="370" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="544" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="718" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="892" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="1066" cy="22" r="10"/><circle cx="1240" cy="22" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="22" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="196" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="370" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="544" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="718" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="892" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="1066" cy="108" r="10"/><circle cx="1240" cy="108" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="22" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="196" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="370" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="544" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="718" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="892" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="1066" cy="194" r="10"/><circle cx="1240" cy="194" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="22" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="196" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="370" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="544" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="718" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="892" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="1066" cy="280" r="10"/><circle cx="1240" cy="280" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <!-- THE red tile (top-left, the 'you') -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="168" height="80" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="22" cy="22" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Cover as a 4x8 grid of profile cards in the bottom 2/3 — the literal 'people search results' view of LinkedIn. The card at top-left is RED (you, the subject); every other card is graphite. The mixed-case 220px title sits centered, weight 500, asserting command. Brand 'in/' in the corner nods to the LinkedIn glyph.
